info.name: Roshan Hegde Backend API
info.description: Postman collection for the current Express API under /api/v1. Auth uses phone lookup plus Firebase OTP verification on the client, then Firebase ID token verification on the backend.

request.description: New riders are created with pending status and cannot log in until an admin approves them.
If the phone number exists, the backend responds that Firebase OTP must be completed on the client app.

item.name: Verify OTP With Firebase ID Token

request.description: Use the Firebase ID token obtained after client-side phone OTP verification.

exec: throw new Error('Response body is not valid JSON');
pm.test('Admin access token is present', function () {

request.description: Admin user-management list for normal users. Response includes stats: totalUsers, activeUsers, blockedUsers.

originalRequest.description: Admin user-management list for normal users. Response includes stats: totalUsers, activeUsers, blockedUsers.

request.description: Admin user-management list filtered to active normal users.

originalRequest.description: Admin user-management list filtered to active normal users.

request.description: Admin user-management list filtered to blocked normal users. Response also includes total/active/blocked user stats.

originalRequest.description: Admin user-management list filtered to blocked normal users. Response also includes total/active/blocked user stats.

request.description: Admin update for users/riders. Supports status updates: User can be Approved or Blocked; Rider can be Pending, Approved, or Blocked.
Blocks a normal user account. Blocked users cannot continue OTP login or verify OTP for tokens.
Unblocks a normal user account by setting status back to Approved.

exec: pm.test('Rider management stats are present', function () {

request.description: Admin-only rider management list. Response includes stats: totalRiders, activeRiders, pendingRiders, blockedRiders.

originalRequest.description: Admin-only rider management list. Response includes stats: totalRiders, activeRiders, pendingRiders, blockedRiders.

request.description: Admin-only rider management list filtered to pending riders.
Admin-only rider management list filtered to active/approved riders.
Admin-only rider management list filtered to blocked riders.
Search riders by string fields such as name, phone number, email, status, and document fields.
Approves a rider and makes the rider active.
Blocks a rider. Blocked riders cannot log in or update location.
Moves a rider back to pending approval.
Estimates order price from common delivery settings. The API converts distanceKm to miles and applies chargePerMile, plus baseDeliveryCharge and minimumDistanceMiles when configured.

originalRequest.description: Estimates order price from common delivery settings. The API converts distanceKm to miles and applies chargePerMile, plus baseDeliveryCharge and minimumDistanceMiles when configured.

item.name: Get User Payment History As Admin

request.description:
Returns the full admin dashboard. The overview object includes revenue stats: totalRevenue, thisMonthRevenue, todayRevenue, and currentPeriodRevenue.
Growth arrays use selected year when year is provided and return Jan-Dec month data.

originalRequest.description: Returns the full admin dashboard. The overview object includes revenue stats: totalRevenue, thisMonthRevenue, todayRevenue, and currentPeriodRevenue.

request.description: Returns dashboard overview metrics. Revenue stats include totalRevenue (all-time paid order revenue), thisMonthRevenue, todayRevenue, and currentPeriodRevenue (date-filtered revenue).

originalRequest.description: Returns dashboard overview metrics. Revenue stats include totalRevenue (all-time paid order revenue), thisMonthRevenue, todayRevenue, and currentPeriodRevenue (date-filtered revenue).

request.description: Year-only monthly revenue trend from paid orders. Returns Jan-Dec with zero-filled months.

originalRequest.description: Year-only monthly revenue trend from paid orders. Returns Jan-Dec with zero-filled months.

request.description: Year-only monthly user growth. Returns Jan-Dec with zero-filled months.

originalRequest.description: Year-only monthly user growth. Returns Jan-Dec with zero-filled months.

request.description: Year-only monthly rider growth. Returns Jan-Dec with zero-filled months.

originalRequest.description: Year-only monthly rider growth. Returns Jan-Dec with zero-filled months.

request.description: Payment income growth endpoint. For frontend monthly earning chart, use Get Revenue Trend with ?year=YYYY.

originalRequest.description: Year-only monthly earning growth from captured payments. Returns Jan-Dec with zero-filled months.
